name: mcpd-portal
description: 1. Install Python 3.10+ 2. Create venv and install requirements:    ```bash    python -m venv .venv    .venv\Scripts\activate    pip install -r requirements.txt    ``` 3. Create `.env` from `.env.example` and set `SECRET_KEY`, `ADMIN_USERNAME`, `ADMIN_PASSWORD`.    For reverse-proxy deployments (IIS/Caddy), also set `TRUST_PROXY=1`. 4. Run:    ```bash    python app.py    ``` 5. Visit `http://localhost:5055`
